arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal sent Matheus Cunha transfer message
arts.sum: Despite interest from Man Utd, Arsenal and Tottenham, Wolves boss Pereira has insisted that Cunha will not leave Molineux in January. The Brazilian forward scored his 10th Premier League goal of the season directly from a corner during Wolves’ 2-0 win over Man Utd on Boxing Day as the Molineux side claimed their second consecutive victory under new boss Pereira.

arts.ttl: Wolves boss delivers update on Man United, Arsenal-linked Matheus Cunha after Brazilian's masterclass vs. Ruben Amorim's struggles
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers head coach Vitor Pereira hopes that his club will be able to keep hold of Matheus Cunha beyond the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta wants 12-goal attacker at Arsenal to catch league leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal may enter the January transfer window to sign a new attacker and add more goals to their team. arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling stance on terminating Arsenal loan deal comes to light
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has struggled for game time at Arsenal so far this season, having joined the Gunners on loan from their Premier League rivals Chelsea over the summer

arts.ttl: Jorginho on Arsenal atmosphere: Can't be unhappy
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho has said spirits are high at the club as they continue their bid to win their first Premier League title in almost 20 years.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Ipswich Town to the Emirates on Friday evening as the festive schedule concludes in North London. Mikel Arteta’s team can move up to second in the table with a win over the Tractor Boys, after Chelsea dropped points on Boxing Day.
